creator: freebsp@mail.ru
text:
Port net-mgmt/nagios has lost dependency. It requires textproc/php5-xml for correct working/

Fix: 

portmaster -d /usr/ports/textproc/php5-xml
How-To-Repeat: Install net-mgmt/nagios and start web-interface of Nagios. It will report about missing xml_parser_sreate() PHP function.
